signin_subtitle: Sign in to your AskBiz account
signup_subtitle: 10 free questions every month — no card needed
age_confirm: By creating an account you confirm you are 13+ (16 in the EU/UK).
consent_details: You consent to data processing for AI-powered business insights, including: analysis of uploaded files, IP-based geolocation for currency detection, and optional POS features such as camera scanning, logistics tracking, and mobile money payments (M-Pesa, MTN, Airtel). Camera images are processed in real time and never stored. See our
footer_consent_prefix: By continuing you agree to our
shopify_subtitle: Sign in or create a free AskBiz account to link your Shopify store and start analysing your data.
err_accept_terms: You must accept the Terms and Privacy Policy to create an account.
err_email_exists: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead, or use a magic link.
ok_check_inbox: Check your inbox at {email} — click the link to activate your account.
ok_magic_sent: Magic link sent to {email} — check your inbox.
phone_hint: Use the number you run your business on (e.g. your M-Pesa line). No SMS needed — just set a 4-digit PIN.
err_invalid_phone: Enter a valid phone number, e.g. 0712 345678 or +254712345678
err_pin_mismatch: PINs don't match — check and try again
passkey_nudge_body: Add a passkey so you can get in with your face or fingerprint — no PIN or password to remember.
